alerts.title: Congress hits Polymarket and Kalshi with a massive insider trading probe
ZachXBT flags $520K Polymarket exploit on Polygon, team says funds are safe
Polymarket aims for prediction market approval in Japan by 2030
Kalshi, Polymarket lose bids to halt Nevada and Washington gambling cases
alerts.summary: The Ninth Circuit said federal derivatives oversight does not shield prediction market firms from state gaming enforcement.

alerts.title: Kalshi-backed prediction market advocacy group debuts with support from former Trump aide
alerts.summary: An advocacy group focused on prediction markets has emerged with support from former White House Deputy Chief of Staff Taylor Budowich.

alerts.title: House Oversight chair launches probe into insider trading on Kalshi and Polymarket
alerts.summary: House Oversight Chairman Comer probes insider trading on Kalshi and Polymarket, sending letters to both CEOs with a June 5 document deadline.

alerts.title: Polymarket probes suspected private key compromise of internal top-up wallet on Polygon
alerts.summary: Polymarket said findings point to a possible private key compromise tied to an internal top-up wallet on Polygon.

alerts.title: Polymarket eyes Japan market entry, appoints regional representative: Bloomberg
alerts.summary: The prediction markets platform aims to secure regulatory authorization to operate in Japan by 2030, according to Bloomberg.

alerts.title: Kalshi Debuts 'Fair Markets' Lobby Group as Congress Opens Insider Trading Probe
alerts.summary: Kalshi unveiled Americans for Fair Markets, an advocacy group to help shape policymakers’ perception of prediction markets.

alerts.title: House Republicans Open Investigation Into Kalshi, Polymarket Over Insider Trading
alerts.summary: The chair of the powerful House Oversight Committee has requested documents from Polymarket and Kalshi regarding insider trading and war-related markets.

alerts.title: Polymarket Hit By ‘Internal Top-Up’ Wallet Exploit, $700K Drained
alerts.summary: User funds remain safe after the incident, the prediction market platform said, with contracts and core infrastructure unaffected.

alerts.title: Polymarket Taps Jupiter Exec to Lead Japan Push: Report
alerts.summary: The prediction market has reportedly appointed a representative in Japan as it aims to secure authorization to operate there by 2030.

alerts.title: NHL Agrees to Share Data With the CFTC for Prediction Market Integrity
alerts.summary: The agreement ensures the regulator and the NHL communicate and share data to protect the integrity of hockey-related prediction markets.

alerts.title: The rise of prediction markets and the surrounding regulatory environment
alerts.summary: A prediction market is an exchange where participants buy and sell event‑linked contracts – usually binary contracts that pay out if a specific future event occurs. These markets have surged into the financial mainstream
